noAccessDesc: Operator and invite management is available to Root admins only. Contact your Root admin if you need access.
title: Operators & invites
subtitle: Manage team members' roles and sign-in access, and issue one-time registration invites.
inviteEmpty: No invites yet. Use "New invite" in the top right to issue one.
roleHintDowngrade: Downgrading the last active Root will be rejected by the server.
statusHintDisable: Once disabled, this operator can no longer sign in.
createRoleHint: The initial role the invitee receives after registering.
createNoteHint: Optional. Helps identify what this invite is for (e.g. a colleague's name or team).
ttlHint: Defaults to 168 hours (7 days); the invite expires automatically after that.
tokenWarnBefore: Copy and save the invite token below right away —
tokenWarnAfter: . After you close this window the full token can no longer be viewed.
copyFailed: Copy failed. Please select and copy the token text manually.
deleteConfirmAfter: ? The invite link will stop working immediately and can no longer be used to register.
